principle: Match content format to keyword intent — informational gets answers, transactional gets buy buttons
explanation: X.seo|keyword_intent: four_types: informational == how/what/why -> direct_answer + FAQ + unique_data; navigational == brand_search -> ensure_pages_findable + HTML_sitemap_in_footer; commercial == best/review -> unbiased_comparison + pros_cons + testimonials; transactional == buy/order/delivery -> simple_checkout + shipping_info + returns_policy; NO:same_page_format_for_all_intents eg: "best_gaming_laptops" == commercial -> write_comparison_table >> NOT product_landing_page

principle: Surround main keyword with its semantic family to prove topical depth to Google
explanation: X.seo|semantic_depth: semantic_keywords == related_terms_around_topic; find_via: People_Also_Ask + Related_Searches + Wikipedia; weave_naturally NOT force; page_without_related_terms == probably_not_relevant; NO:keyword_stuffing NO:only_main_keyword eg: "coffee_page_only_says_coffee" >> "coffee + cafe + latte + espresso + arabica + fair_trade == proves_topical_authority"

principle: Use AI tools for keyword ideas but never trust their traffic or difficulty estimates
explanation: X.seo|ai_keyword_caveat: ChatGPT/Gemini == excellent_for_generating_keyword_lists; BUT traffic_numbers_from_AI == fabricated; difficulty_scores_from_AI == unreliable; always_validate_with: Google_Ads_Keyword_Planner OR Ahrefs OR SEMRush; NO:planning_SEO_strategy_on_AI_estimates eg: "AI_says_keyword_has_50k_searches" >> "validate: actual_volume_is_200_searches"

principle: Target low-difficulty keywords first for quick wins — Google Ads competition score is not SEO difficulty
explanation: X.seo|easy_wins_first: use_SEO_difficulty_score (Ahrefs/SEMRush) NOT Google_Ads_competition_score; Ads_competition == how_many_ADVERTISERS_bid != how_hard_to_RANK_organically; start_with: low_difficulty + decent_traffic == fast_results; NO:chasing_head_terms_against_giants eg: "book_store_online" == competing_vs_Amazon >> "antique_book_stores_online" == low_competition_easy_win
